untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detecting divergence between two correlated time series (price and an unspecified indicator failing to move together), persistence tracking over 5+ bars, and magnitude thresholds relative to recent range. The allowed indicator set lacks: (1) an explicit divergence detection operator, (2) multi-bar persistence memory without array indexing, (3) dynamic recent range calculation. Conditions above use price/MACD as a proxy divergence pair, but this does not capture the true signal intent of monitoring any two normally-correlated series for breakdown.
translation_notes: ARONSON_DRY_0_0 describes a general divergence framework rather than a specific indicator pair. Interpreted as price-MACD divergence with 20-bar trend establishment (implied via SMA_20) and 5-bar confirmation via histogram sign persistence. The 2% magnitude threshold and exact divergence persistence logic cannot be precisely encoded without custom operators. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification. Recommend manual review of actual correlated pairs intended by trader.
